title: Junior Investment Banker at Sharekhan Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Sharekhan Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Sharekhan Global Group in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan Global Group:
Sharekhan Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan Global Group!
